logs.text:
Workspace Setup
Step 2 of 5
AI Service Setup

Check the connection to the local AI service that runs on your computer.

To continue, install the local AI runtime or choose Skip for now. Skipping is supported: source checks still work, and you can finish AI setup later from AI Model.
Choose how to continue

You can install local AI now, or skip it and finish setup. Source checks still work without AI.

Install local AI runtime
Retry
Skip for now
Local AI Service Connection

Local RAM: 15 GB

Couldn't reach the AI service

The private AI service did not start. First try restarting Civic Desk. If Windows or antivirus asked about this app, allow it, then retry. If it still fails, save a diagnostics file for support.

If this is a clean machine, Civic Desk can download and install its local AI runtime for you. This is a large one-time download and may take a while.

Need help from support?
Back
Next

To continue, install the local AI runtime or choose Skip for now. Skipping is supported: source checks still work, and you can finish AI setup later from AI Model.

Retry

Local AI Service Connection

Local RAM: 15 GB

Couldn't reach the AI service

The private AI service did not start. First try restarting Civic Desk. If Windows or antivirus asked about this app, allow it, then retry. If it still fails, save a diagnostics file for support.

If this is a clean machine, Civic Desk can download and install its local AI runtime for you. This is a large one-time download and may take a while.

Need help from support?
Back
Next
Skip AI setup?

AI drafting and AI-assisted review will stay limited until you complete setup from AI Model. Deterministic source checks can still run.

Keep setting up AI
Continue without AI

Workspace Setup
Step 4 of 5
Defaults

Configure publication directories and backup database paths.

Use the recommended local folders

The Civic Desk will save finished publication files and backups in your Windows user profile. You can change these later in Settings.

Advanced: choose exact folders
Back
Next

Workspace Setup
Step 5 of 5
Done

Onboarding completed. Ready to inspect local stories.

Workspace ready.

You can enter the workspace now. If you skipped local AI setup, drafting and AI-assisted review stay limited until you finish AI Model setup.

What's next?
Starter sources may be added automatically when you enter the workspace.
Daily Scan is next once the starter-source step finishes, or you can add sources manually.
Review leads in Story Queue, then draft and edit in Workbench.
Finish AI Model setup later if you skipped it here.
Back
Finish Onboarding
